info.title: Music Assistant API
info.description:
Music Assistant API provides control over your music library, players, and playback.

This specification documents the API structure and data models. For a complete list of available commands with examples, see the Commands Reference page.

post.description:
Execute any Music Assistant API command.

See the **Commands Reference** page for a complete list of available commands with examples.

400.description: Bad request - invalid command or parameters

post.description: Login with username and password to obtain an access token.

get.description: Returns list of configured authentication providers.

post.description: Handle initial setup of the Music Assistant server including creating the first admin user. Only accessible when no users exist.

400.description: Setup already completed or invalid request

get.description: Returns server information including schema version and authentication status.

ExternalID.description: Enum: ExternalID. Possible values: musicbrainz_artistid, musicbrainz_albumid, musicbrainz_releasegroupid, musicbrainz_trackid, musicbrainz_recordingid, isrc, barcode, acoustid, asin, discogs, tadb, unknown

MediaType.description: Enum: MediaType. Possible values: artist, album, track, playlist, radio, audiobook, podcast, podcast_episode, folder, announcement, flow_stream, plugin_source, sound_effect, genre, unknown

ContentType.description: Enum: ContentType. Possible values: ogg, wav, aiff, mpeg, m4a, mp4, mp4a, m4b, dsf, flac, mp3, wma, wmav2, wmapro, wavpack, tak, ape, mpc, aac, alac, opus, vorbis, ac3, eac3, dts, truehd, dtshd, dtsx, cook, ralf, mp2, mp1, dra, atrac3, s16le, s24le, s32le, f32le, f64le, s16be, s24be, s32be, pcm_bluray, pcm_dvd, adpcm_ima_qt, adpcm_ms, adpcm_swf, dsd_lsbf, dsd_msbf, dsd_lsbf_planar, dsd_msbf_planar, amr_nb, amr_wb, speex, alaw, mulaw, g722, g726, pcm, nut, ?

ImageType.description: Enum: ImageType. Possible values: thumb, landscape, fanart, logo, clearart, banner, cutout, back, discart, other

LinkType.description: Enum: LinkType. Possible values: website, facebook, twitter, lastfm, youtube, instagram, snapchat, tiktok, discogs, wikipedia, allmusic, unknown

AlbumType.description: Enum: AlbumType. Possible values: album, single, live, soundtrack, compilation, ep, unknown

TaskStatus.description: Enum: TaskStatus. Possible values: idle, pending, running, success, partial_success, failed, cancelled, unknown

TaskScheduleType.description: Enum: TaskScheduleType. Possible values: hourly, daily, weekly, unknown

ProviderType.description: Enum: ProviderType. Possible values: music, player, metadata, plugin, core, audio_analysis, unknown

ProviderStage.description: Enum: ProviderStage. Possible values: alpha, beta, stable, experimental, unmaintained, deprecated

CoreState.description: Enum: CoreState. Possible values: starting, running, stopping, stopped

ConfigEntryType.description: Enum: ConfigEntryType. Possible values: boolean, string, secure_string, integer, float, label, splitted_string, divider, action, icon, alert, unknown

ConfigValueType.description: Type alias for configuration value types. Can be boolean, number, integer, string, array of number, array of integer, array of string, array of boolean, or null.

ParametricEQBandType.description: Enum: ParametricEQBandType. Possible values: peak, high_shelf, low_shelf, high_pass, low_pass, notch, unknown

AudioChannel.description: Enum: AudioChannel. Possible values: ALL, FL, FR

PlayerType.description: Enum: PlayerType. Possible values: player, stereo_pair, group, protocol, unknown

MediaItemType.description: Type alias for media item types. Can be Artist, Album, Track, Radio, Playlist, Audiobook, Podcast, PodcastEpisode, or Genre.

PlayerFeature.description: Enum: PlayerFeature. Possible values: power, volume_set, volume_mute, pause, set_members, multi_device_dsp, seek, next_previous, play_announcement, enqueue, select_sound_mode, select_source, options, gapless_playback, gapless_different_samplerate, play_media, unknown

PlaybackState.description: Enum: PlaybackState. Possible values: idle, paused, playing, unknown

PlayerOptionType.description: Enum: PlayerOptionType. Possible values: boolean, integer, float, string

RepeatMode.description: Enum: RepeatMode. Possible values: off, one, all, unknown

StreamType.description: Enum: StreamType. Possible values: http, encrypted_http, hls, icy, shoutcast, in_band, local_file, named_pipe, other_ffmpeg, custom, unknown

VolumeNormalizationMode.description: Enum: VolumeNormalizationMode. Possible values: disabled, dynamic, measurement_only, fallback_fixed_gain, fixed_gain, fallback_dynamic, unknown

DSPState.description: Enum: DSPState. Possible values: enabled, disabled, disabled_by_unsupported_group

QueueOption.description: Enum: QueueOption. Possible values: play, replace, next, replace_next, add, unknown

UserRole.description: Enum: UserRole. Possible values: admin, user, guest
